title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 452.845 - Priority of jurisdictional question
text:
452.845.  Priority of jurisdictional question. — If a question of existence or exercise of jurisdiction under sections 452.700 to 452.930 is raised in a child custody proceeding, the question, upon request of a party, must be given priority on the calendar and handled expeditiously.
(L. 2009 H.B. 481)
